calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause (Per Gc 11188)
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Richard D. Buckley, Jr., Esq. of Arent Fox LLP, 213.443.7569, appearing for the Defendant/Moving Party Anschutz Entertainment Group, Inc.;
Atty. Ginger L. Sotelo, Esq., Pahl & McCay, 408.248.1000, appearing for Plaintiff Flexible Funding Ltd. Liability Co.

Order To Show Cause (Per GC 11188). Matter called, ARGUMENT is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:
Petitioner's petition to enforce investigative subpoena and investigative interrogatories is granted in part as follows. Respondent shall respond in full to Investigative Interrogatory No. 3. The parties shall continue to meet and confer regarding Respondent's responses to the remaining contested interrogatories and subpoena requests, and Respondent shall certify that it has provided complete responses after addressing any remaining questions or concerns regarding the scope of those requests and the completeness of its responses to date.

(The Court and counsel confer regarding resolution of any remaining discovery disputes with a neutral either by way of a discovery referee/judge pro tem or through ADR/JAMS.)

The Court ordered that the meet and confer process be completed within 60 days and that final production be completed within 90 days.

The Court noted that any remaining discovery disputes are to be directed to the discovery department.

(See Word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Order To Show Cause (Per Gc 11188)
Off Calendar Jan-08-2021 Continued To Mar-10-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Order To Show Cause (Per Gc 11188)
Off Calendar Oct-30-2020 Continued To Feb-08-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
